zh.Egremont, Cumberland, England: 英國波藍德艾格雷蒙特
zh.St Mary Magdalene's Church, Lanercost, C: 英國波藍德萊納爾可斯特聖 瑪麗 馬格達萊也斯 邱奇
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas I de Multon of Egremont於1226年9月15日出生在英國波藍德時，他的父親Lambert de Multon II of Egremont36歲，母親Amabel Lucy25歲。他於大約1250年與Ida結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1294年4月29日之前在英國波藍德艾格雷蒙特，埋葬在英國波藍德萊納爾可斯特聖 瑪麗 馬格達萊也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas I de Multon of Egremont于1226年9月15日出生在英国波藍德时，他的父亲Lambert de Multon II of Egremont36岁，母亲Amabel Lucy25岁。他于大约1250年与Ida结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1294年4月29日之前在英国波藍德艾格雷蒙特，埋葬在英国波藍德萊納爾可斯特聖 瑪麗 馬格達萊也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Multon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Moulton
meanings: English (mainly Cheshire and Lancashire): habitational name from one or more of the places called Moulton (Cheshire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk, Northamptonshire, Staffordshire, Suffolk, North Yorkshire), most of which are named with the Old English personal name Mūl(a), the Old Norse personal name Múli, or Old English mūl ‘mule’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas I de Multon of Egremont was born on 15 September 1226, in Cumberland, England, his father, Lambert de Multon II of Egremont, was 36 and his mother, Amabel Lucy, was 25. He married Ida about 1250. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died before 29 April 1294, in Egremont, Cumberland, England, and was buried in St Mary Magdalene's Church, Lanercost, Cumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas I de Multon of Egremont est né le 15 septembre 1226, à Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Lambert de Multon II of Egremont, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Amabel Lucy, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Ida environ 1250. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé avant 29 avril 1294, à Egremont, Cumberland, Angleterre, et a été enterré à St Mary Magdalene's Church, Lanercost, Cumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas I de Multon of Egremont am 15. September 1226 in Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lambert de Multon II of Egremont 36 und seine Mutter Amabel Lucy 25. Er hat um 1250 Ida geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb vor 29. April 1294 in Egremont, Cumberland, England und wurde in St Mary Magdalene's Church, Lanercost, Cumberland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas I de Multon of Egremont è nato il il 15 settembre 1226 nel Cumberland, England, il suo padre, Lambert de Multon II of Egremont, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Amabel Lucy, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Ida circa 1250. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì prima del 29 aprile 1294, nel Egremont, Cumberland, England, e fu sepolto a St Mary Magdalene's Church, Lanercost, Cumberland, England.

ja.St Mary Magdalene's Church, Lanercost, C: イギリスクウンバーランドランエルコストスト マリー マグダリーネ'ス チャーチ
ja.lifeSummary: Thomas I de Multon of Egremontが1226年9月15日にイギリスクウンバーランドで生まれた時，父Lambert de Multon II of Egremontは36歳，母Amabel Lucyは25歳であった。約1250年にIdaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1294年4月29日以前にイギリスクウンバーランドエグレモントで死去し，イギリスクウンバーランドランエルコストスト マリー マグダリーネ'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Mary Magdalene's Church, Lanercost, C: 영국 쿠벌랜드 랜르코스트 스트 메리 막그다렌'스 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas I de Multon of Egremont(이)가 1226년 9월 15일 영국 쿠벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lambert de Multon II of Egremont(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Amabel Lucy(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1250년 Ida(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1294년 4월 29일 이전 영국 쿠벌랜드 그렘트에서 사망했으며 영국 쿠벌랜드 랜르코스트 스트 메리 막그다렌'스 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.St Mary Magdalene's Church, Lanercost, C: St Mary Magdalene's Church, Lanercost, Cumberland, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas I de Multon of Egremont nasceu em 15 de setembro de 1226, em Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lambert de Multon II of Egremont, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Amabel Lucy, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Ida aproximadamente 1250. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu antes 29 de abril de 1294, em Egremont, Cumberland, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em St Mary Magdalene's Church, Lanercost, Cumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.St Mary Magdalene's Church, Lanercost, C: ст мэри магдеилине'с чурч, ланиркост, кумбирланд, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas I de Multon of Egremont родился 15 сентября 1226 г. в местности кумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Lambert de Multon II of Egremont было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Amabel Lucy, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Ida около 1250 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер перед 29 апрель 1294 г. в местности эгремонт, кумбирланд, Англия и был похоронен в местности ст мэри магдеилине'с чурч, ланиркост, кумбирланд, Англия.
